issue_description: Customer provided inconsistent business addresses across onboarding documents.
Outgoing transfers were structured to avoid a commonly referenced reporting threshold across multiple days.
A payment referenced vague terms like "consulting services" without supporting invoices or contracts.
Beneficial ownership disclosures were incomplete and later corrected after follow-up requests.
Funds were rapidly moved through several accounts with no clear economic purpose.
Counterparty originated from a jurisdiction associated with sanctions concerns and no screening rationale was documented.
Customer declined to provide source-of-funds details for cash deposits followed by immediate wire outflows.
Transactions show frequent use of third parties that do not align with the declared customer profile.
A merchant account received refunds immediately after chargebacks with minimal documentation.
Customer requested changing payment instructions to different recipients after funds were already initiated.
